42:
(-Letter from Cemi-)<Emphasis>I tell you, Near Eastern culture is simply fascinating! In particular, I've become quite enamored with the local cuisine, especially the simply divine dish they call hamsa curry. You simply <Emphasis>must</Emphasis> try it if you haven't already! Till we meet again.
Yours truly,
Cemi</Emphasis>
